patch_2026-05-30_wow1_inline_cascade: SPINE surface (track: spine, FULL rigor incl. AR-RTL). Spec docs/specs/wow-1-inline-cascade.md §8. Added namespace convenience.inline_cascade.* = 10 leaf keys to ALL 6 locales (DE source verbatim from §8 table FIRST, then DE→target direct, human-reviewed; never via EN). Keys: live_region_label, once_only_label, source_line ({datum} placeholder kept — date is component-formatted dd.MM.yyyy, NOT localized in JSON), posteingang_landing (ICU plural, {count}/# kept), posteingang_cta, disclaimer ([MOCK] literal), row_status.{in_progress,confirmed,pending,failed}. MERGED into existing convenience object as new sibling AFTER convenience.assistant — value_receipt/step/receipt/datenkat/assistant siblings untouched (anchored on convenience.assistant.run_summary_intro → katalog transition, identical line 2728/2960 in all locales). Did NOT touch de.json semantics beyond adding the new source block (allowed: this namespace originates here per §8 ownership 'i18n-localizer owns — adds to de.json source'). Did NOT duplicate reused keys: convenience.value_receipt.ca_prefix ('ca.') + assistent.tool.cta_kaskade ('Kaskade ansehen') left byte-identical and referenced by coders, not re-added. ICU plural categories CORRECT per CLDR (NOT copied from DE one/other skeleton): de/en one/other (+=0); ru =0/one/few/many/other; uk =0/one/few/many/other; ar =0/one/two/few/many/other (zero handled via =0 empty-state text); tr =0/other (Turkish has no numeral plural agreement). Counted noun agreement hand-checked: ru подтверждение/подтверждения/подтверждений, uk підтвердження/підтвердження/підтверджень, ar تأكيد واحد/تأكيدان/# تأكيدات/# تأكيدًا. Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar فصحى formal (مضطرًّا/بياناتك), tr Siz (verileriniz/zorunda kalmadığınız). UK is a SEPARATE translation from RU (відомства≠ведомства, поштова скринька≠почтовый ящик, передається≠передаётся, не вдалося≠не удалось). Stammdaten kept Latin in parens for ru/uk/ar/tr per Behörden-Terminus rule; Posteingang rendered as localized inbox concept (почтовый ящик / поштова скринька / صندوق الوارد / gelen kutusu) — it is the app's own inbox surface, not a Behörden-Eigenname. [MOCK] token literal verbatim in all 6 disclaimers. AR RTL-safe: {datum}/#/[MOCK] LTR tokens render correctly via bidi under dir='rtl'; verified dir flip is wired in src/app/layout.tsx:28 (rtlLocales=['ar'] in src/i18n/routing.ts:9) — html dir flips per locale; no embedded markup, no directional icon in any string (ArrowRight mirroring is component-side per §7). Length discipline: AR/RU live_region_label + posteingang_landing longest, within 40% tolerance vs DE; flagged none as layout-breaking (frontend renders in card body, wraps). Owned files only: locales/{de,en,ru,uk,ar,tr}.json + this _status.json note. Did NOT touch any .tsx/.ts. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable in this agent (no Bash) — main-thread JSON.parse recommended on all 6 per V1.5 lesson before commit; structural review PASS on all 6 (balanced braces, no trailing commas, ASCII double-quotes only, assistant→inline_cascade→katalog transition verified by re-read).
patch_2026-05-30_pass2_parity_eudi_actio: Parity fix. Two namespaces existed in de.json (source) but were MISSING in all 5 target locales → MISSING_MESSAGE on Dokumente + Termine screens. Added (DE→target direct, human-reviewed, structure mirrored EXACTLY from de.json): dokumente.eudi.{button,dialog_title,disclaimer_2027,download,mock_badge,close,payload_label} (7 keys) + termine.action.{bestaetigen,verschieben,absagen,confirm_cancel,verschoben_um,bestaetigt,abgesagt,vorschlag} (8 keys) = 15 leaf keys per locale × 5 = 75 strings. MERGE into existing dokumente/termine objects — siblings untouched (anchored on filter.status_label / termine.error). [MOCK] token kept literal verbatim in every locale (button n/a, dialog_title + disclaimer_2027 + mock_badge carry it). Behörden-Eigenname 'EUDI Wallet' / 'EUDI' kept in Latin script in ALL 5 incl. AR. Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar فصحى formal, tr Siz. confirm_cancel phrased as polite formal question per locale. UK is a SEPARATE translation from RU (not auto-derived): подтвердить/підтвердити, отменить/скасувати, приём/прийом diverge. AR RTL-safe: 'EUDI Wallet'+'[MOCK]' Latin render LTR via bidi, no embedded markup, dir flip in app/layout.tsx. Did NOT touch de.json. Did NOT touch any other namespace. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable in this agent (no Bash) — RECOMMEND main-thread JSON.parse on all 5 per V1.5 lesson before commit; structural review PASS on all 5 (balanced braces, no trailing commas, eudi→termine and action→steuer transitions verified by re-read).
patch_2026-05-30_pass1_convenience: Pass-1 convenience/spine sync. Added to en/ru/uk/ar/tr (DE→target direct, FULL quality, human-reviewed): dashboard.greeting.guten_tag; the full dashboard legacy-mirror block (titel, untertitel, fehler.laden, letzter_login, prototyp_hinweis.text, seit_login.{titel,neue_briefe,frist_naeher,vorgang_abgeschlossen}, heute.{titel,tab_ki,tab_frist,tab_behoerde,tab_vorgang,empty_title,empty_body,done,snooze,snooze_days,actions_label}, triumph.{title,subtitle,zeitersparnis,link,gerade_eben}, erledigt_feed.{title,empty}, achievement.jahr, kacheln.{fristen,posteingang,vorgaenge,termine,datenschutz,stammdaten}.*); common.posteingang.label; umzug.detail.dokumente_count (ICU plural); convenience.value_receipt.{zeitersparnis,ca_prefix,minuten_suffix} + convenience.step.{basis_label,data_label} + convenience.datenkat.* (14 data-category labels) + convenience.assistant.run_summary_intro; FIXED shared.neu_badge (was bogus shared.shared:'shared' in all 5 — replaced with proper translation: new/новое/нове/جديد/yeni). FIXED ru.convenience.value_receipt key 'klassische_schритте' (Cyrillic chars in JSON KEY → never matched DE 'klassische_schritte'); corrected. autopilotRun/katalog/convenience.receipt blocks already present from prior pass — left byte-identical except the convenience expansion above. Conservative hedging preserved (ca./approx./ок./бл./تقريباً/yakl.; zeitersparnis 'time saved (approx.)'). [MOCK] kept literal in disclaimer_conservative. § citations / Art. 6 verbatim (none added in this pass beyond existing). Behörden-Termini parenthesized w/ DE Latin in datenkat: Beitragsnummer, Steuer-IdNr., Versichertennummer, Wohnungsgeberbestätigung, eAT, Kindergeldnummer. Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar formal أنت/imperative, tr Siz. ICU plural categories per locale: ru one/few/many/other, uk one/few/many/other, ar zero/one/two/few/many/other, en/tr one/other. AR RTL-safe: Latin terms + {count}/{min}/{name}/{vorgang} tokens render LTR via bidi, no embedded markup, dir flip in app/layout.tsx. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable in this agent (no Bash) — main-thread JSON.parse recommended per V1.5 lesson; structural review PASS on all 5 (balanced braces, no trailing commas, every file ends shared→root close).
patch_2026-05-27_error_not_found: Added error.not_found.{code,title,description,cta} (4 keys) to en/ru/uk/ar/tr — were DE-only after not-found.tsx cleanup pass and threw MISSING_MESSAGE on non-DE 404. DE→target direct. 'Dashboard' kept as product term in all 5 (cta + description). Error code natural per locale: Error 404 / Ошибка 404 / Помилка 404 / خطأ 404 / Hata 404. Formal pronouns: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar formal imperative (عُد / للمتابعة), tr Siz (dönün). AR RTL-safe: 'Dashboard' Latin renders LTR via bidi, no embedded markup, dir flip handled in app/layout.tsx. Did NOT touch de.json. Structural JSON review PASS on all 5 (balanced braces, no trailing comma in new block, footer→error→shell order matches DE source).
